productDisplayName: Arrow Men  Green & Blue Check Shirt
description: Style noteRefresh your formal wardrobe with this shirt from arrow. This piece gives a face lift to your on-duty staples with its flattering cut and impeccable silhouetting. It sits well under a structured blazer for dressy occasions. Wear this with dark and light chinos to alternate between looks when you're heading to work. Style this with formal shoes from provogue, available online at myntra. For a stylish fusion of formal and casual, wear this with classic denims, a bold belt and tonal casual leather shoes.Product DetailsWhite, blue and green checked shirt, has a spread collar, short sleeves, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, brand embroidered on the right sleeve cuff and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
